allow: Bash(node -e "const pkg = require\('wagmi/package.json'\); console.log\('wagmi version:', pkg.version\)")

Bash(sed -i 's/Đóng/Close/g; s/Thử lại/Try again/g; s/Lỗi không xác định/Unknown error/g; s/Mint Layout lên On-chain/Mint Layout On-chain/g; s/Ví:/Wallet:/g; s/Chưa kết nối ví — bấm Mint sẽ yêu cầu kết nối/No wallet connected — clicking Mint will prompt connection/g' app/_components/LayoutEditor/MintModal.tsx)

Bash(sed -i 's/placeholder="VD: Siêu thị mini 80m².*"/placeholder="e.g. Mini mart 80m² — optimized traffic flow"/g; s/placeholder="Description layout, kinh nghiệm, kết quả thực tế\\.\\.\\."/placeholder="Describe your layout, insights, real-world results..."/g; s/Xác nhận \\& Mua/Confirm \\& Buy/g' app/_components/LayoutEditor/MintModal.tsx)

PowerShell(Stop-Process -Id 41180 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep 2; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Remove-Item "c:\\Users\\Admin\\OneDrive\\Máy tính\\storescope-ai-Shelby\\.next\\dev\\lock" -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output "Cleaned up")
